You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr. Smita Verma has completed her M.Sc. (Applied Mathematics) from SGSITS, Indore. After that she joined M.Tech. course in Future Studies and Planning from Devi Ahilya University Indore. She completed the compulsory training of M.Tech. course from Gajra Gears Industry, Dewas in Inventory Management. Then she was awarded the Senior Research Fellowship of CSIR(Council for Scientific & Industrial Research, New Delhi, India), during that she also completed her Ph.D. As a faculty, Dr. Smita Verma joined the Institute in 2001 and having more than 20 years of teaching experience. She has published 32 research papers and presented 22 papers in various National and International Conferences, including 3rd International Conference on Advances in Engineering Sciences and Applied Mathematics (ICAESAM’2015)at London and IV International Conference of Applied Mathematics, Modeling and Computational Science, Organized by Wilfrid Laurier University, Waterloo, Ontario, Canada. Dr. Verma has guided 03 M.Phil. thesis and around 25 P.G. Dissertations. She is guiding 04 Ph.D. and 01 student was awarded with PhD. Her research interests are in mathematical optimization and application of optimization techniques for solving various engineering problems. Presently working on Data Envelopment Analysis and Fuzzy- Data Envelopment Analysis. Education and Qualification: S.No. Degree Specialization Year Exam Conducted by/University/Board 1. B.Sc. Computer Science 1994 Devi Ahilya University, Indore 2. M.Sc. Applied Mathematics 1996 Devi Ahilya University, Indore 3. M.Tech. Future Studies and Planning 1998 Devi Ahilya University, Indore 4. Ph.D. Engineering Sciences 2002 Devi Ahilya University, Indore 5. M.B.A. Human Resource Management 2014 Sikkim Manipal University,Sikkim 6. CMI-Level-5 Leadership and Management 2020-21 Dudley College of Engineering, Dudley, UK Work Experience: S. No. Designation Department Employer Name Duration of Employment 1. Professor Applied Mathematics and Computational Science Shri G. S. Institute of Technology and Science 23 Dec. 2018 till date 2. Associate Professor Applied Mathematics and Computational Science Shri G. S. Institute of Technology and Science 23 Dec. 2015 to 22 Dec. 2018 3. Assistant Professor Applied Mathematics and Computational Science Shri G. S. Institute of Technology and Science 23 Dec. 2003 to 22 Dec. 2015 4. Assistant Professor (on Contract) Applied Mathematics and Computational Science Shri G. S. Institute of Technology and Science 10 Aug. 2001 to 22 Dec. 2003 5. Senior Research Fellow School of Future Studies and Planning CSIR New Delhi Feb. 1998- June 2001 Research Details: My research interests are in mathematical optimization and application of optimization techniques for solving various engineering problems. Presently working on solving non-linear programming problems, named the fractional programming problem, by using the concept of Data Envelopment Analysis and Fuzzy- Data Envelopment Analysis. Which is a nonparametric method for the estimation of production frontiers. It is used to empirically measure technical efficiency of decision-making units (DMUs). PhD Supervision: S,No. Name of Candidate Status Title University 1. Dr. Ranu Sharma Awarded Generalization of Topological Spaces Devi Ahilya University, Indore 2.
